name: Nikolai Gogol
description:
“I am not the sunshine, i am not the moon at night... who else could i be? When i can hardly see?”

  • Dr. Sunshine is dead, by will wood and the tapeworms

In which you work with nikolai as a jester to entertain the king, Fyodor.

Crashing out, i took a 30 minute long break (my hand was hurting worse than when i gooned to danpo for the first time) consisting of scrolling through Pintrest to giggle at nam-gyu and thanos edits. Anyway😝😝😝 i love gooning to danpo- WHATTTT WHO SAID THAT😱😱😱🤯🤯🤯😨😨😰😰😥😰😱😱🤯🤯😨😰🤯🤯🤯😱😱😰😥😱🤯🤯🤯🤯😱😱😰😥😨😰😥😰😨😱😱😱😱🤯🤯😱😨😰😰🤯🤯🤯🤯😱😨😰😨😱🤯🤯🤯😱😨😨😨😱🤯😱😨😰😰😰😰😰😥😰😨😨😥😥😰😰😱🤯🤯

Anywayy uh.

Have you ever wanted to just
